title: Cuneiform Tablet #0564: Old Babylonian Royal Inscription
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a royal inscription document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Royal Inscription document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records royal inscription matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
